name: USS Doyle C. Barnes (DE 353)
events: 28 Apr 1945 USS Bullhead (Cdr. W.T. Griffith, USN) ended her 1st war patrol at Subic Bay, Philippines. She was escorted in by USS Doyle C. Barnes (Lt.Cdr. J.P. Ingle, Jr., USNR).
At Subic Bay she was refitted by USS Howard W. Gilmore.
17 May 1945 USS Blenny (Cdr. W.H. Hazzard, USN) arrived at Subic Bay, She was escorted in by USS Doyle C. Barnes (Lt.Cdr. J.P. Ingle, Jr., USNR).
19 May 1945 At 1400 I/19, USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) departed from Subic Bay for her 3rd war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the Gulf of Siam.
She was escorted out until 2145 I/19, by USS Doyle C. Barnes (Lt.Cdr. J.P. Ingle, Jr., USNR) with whom also training exercises were carried out.
